name: NovaKur Dark Theme for OpenCart 4
shortDescription: A sleek dark-mode OpenCart 4 theme with hero banner, category grid, featured products section, and custom header/footer.
description: NovaKur Dark is the dark variant of the NovaKur theme family for OpenCart 4. It features a full dark-mode storefront with a custom hero banner, benefits bar, category grid, featured products carousel, newsletter signup section, and redesigned header and footer. Install via OCMOD — no core file edits required.
